prompt_task: Identify the ancestry group which was used to compute these summary statistics in the file gwas.ancestry.q1.tsv.gz. Your answer should be one of the following population codes: AFR (African), ASJ (Ashkenazi Jew), EAS (East Asian), EUR (European),  HIS (Hispanic), MID (Middle Eastern), OCE (Oceania), SAS (South Asian). Respond with the 3 letter code only. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
